title: Best Auckland Day Trips for Families — Within 2 Hours of the CBD
meta_desc: Explore the best Auckland day trips for families within 2 hours of the CBD, including Waiheke Island and Coromandel
intro: Looking for a quick escape from Auckland city with your family? Within 2 hours of the CBD, you can find stunning beaches, glowworm caves, and even Middle-earth. We've got the top picks for Auckland day trips that are perfect for families, with activities to suit all ages and interests.

sections.heading: Waiheke Island Day Trip
sections.body: Just a 35-minute ferry ride from Auckland's CBD, Waiheke Island is a haven for families. With its beautiful beaches, vineyards, and olive groves, there's something for everyone. You can take a guided tour or explore the island on your own. The ferry costs around $42 return for adults and $22 for children (5-15 years), while kids under 5 travel free.

sections.heading: Waitomo Glowworm Caves
list: Guided tour prices start from $55 per adult and $25 per child (4-14 years)
Combination tours available, including Hobbiton Movie Set and Rotorua attractions

sections.heading: Coromandel Day Trip
sections.body: The Coromandel Peninsula is approximately 2 hours away from Auckland's CBD, making it an ideal day trip destination. Hot Water Beach, Hahei Beach, and Cathedral Cove are some of the top attractions. You can also take a guided tour or explore the area on your own. Be sure to check the tide times for Hot Water Beach to make the most of your visit.

sections.heading: Comparison of Auckland Day Trip Destinations
Piha and Hobbiton Day Trips
sections.body: Piha Beach, with its stunning black sand and rugged coastline, is approximately 1 hour away from Auckland's CBD. The Hobbiton Movie Set, located near Matamata, is about 2 hours away. You can visit both destinations on a guided tour or explore them on your own. Guided tour prices for Hobbiton start from $89 per adult and $44 per child (9-16 years).

cta.text: Use our NZ Family Travel Budget Calculator to plan your day trip

sections.heading: Accommodation Options for Extended Stay
sections.body: If you'd like to turn your day trip into a weekend getaway, consider exploring our campervan options or choosing from a range of family-friendly accommodations in the Coromandel or near Hobbiton.
